where.if: AND (company_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR business_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%'))

mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM tb_company
ORDER BY company_name ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_company ( tenant_id, company_type, seller_type, company_name, business_no, ceo_name, postal_code, address1, address2, phone, email, default_tax_type, biz_status, status ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{companyType}, #{sellerType}, #{companyName}, #{businessNo}, #{ceoName}, #{postalCode}, #{address1}, #{address2}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{defaultTaxType}, 'ACTIVE', 'ACTIVE' )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_company SET company_name = #{companyName}, ceo_name = #{ceoName}, postal_code = #{postalCode}, address1 = #{address1}, address2 = #{address2}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, default_tax_type = #{defaultTaxType}, seller_type = #{sellerType}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE company_id = #{companyId}
mapper.select: SELECT contact_id AS contactId, company_id AS companyId, contact_name AS contactName, contact_role AS contactRole, mobile, email, is_primary AS isPrimary, linked_user_id AS linkedUserId, status, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM tb_company_contact WHERE company_id = #{companyId} ORDER BY is_primary DESC, created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_company_contact ( company_id, contact_name, contact_role, mobile, email, is_primary, linked_user_id, status, created_at ) VALUES ( #{companyId}, #{contactName}, #{contactRole}, #{mobile}, #{email}, #{isPrimary}, #{linkedUserId}, 'ACTIVE', NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE contact_name = #{contactName}, contact_role = #{contactRole}, mobile = #{mobile}, email = #{email}, is_primary = #{isPrimary}, updated_at = NOW()
